summary: Bug fix verified: Employees without plan assignments now correctly get 1H (no offer) instead of 1B. Only 2 employees (David Chen, Chase Cooper) with explicit plan_assignments get non-1H codes. 1095-C forms correctly show only 2 forms (not 47). All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend verified - IRS Forms page shows 2 1095-C forms with correct offer codes.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/enrollment/assignments/{employer_id} returns only 2 assignments (David Chen, Chase Cooper)
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/eligibility/{employer_id} - Correct offer codes persisted
Backend: FT employee without assignment gets 1H
Backend: Employees with plan assignment get 1B
Frontend: Login with fajju2001@gmail.com / test123 successful
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 60 employees, 47 FT, 57.25 FTE, ALE status
Frontend: IRS Forms page shows 1095-C FORMS: 2 (employees offered coverage)
Frontend: Generate All Forms creates 1 Form 1094-C + 2 Forms 1095-C
Frontend: Forms 1095-C tab shows only David Chen and Chase Cooper
Frontend: Both forms show Line 14: 1B (correct offer code)
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix correctly implemented in _recalculate_offer_code (lines 50-60): No explicit plan assignment = 1H
Bug fix correctly implemented in run_eligibility_engine (lines 667-675): Checks plan_assignments before assigning offer codes
1095-C endpoint correctly filters out 1H employees (line 2344 in server.py)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employer with 60 employees, 2 plan assignments (David Chen, Chase Cooper -> Standard EPO)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offer code bug fix verified. Key changes: (1) _recalculate_offer_code now returns 1H if no plan_assignments exist for employee. (2) run_eligibility_engine checks plan_assignments before assigning offer codes. (3) Only 2 employees have plan assignments: David Chen and Chase Cooper -> Standard EPO. (4) Offer code distribution: 1B(2), 1H(58). (5) 1095-C forms only generated for employees with non-1H codes (2 forms, not 47).

verified_fixes.offer_code_fallback_removed: No longer assumes all active medical plans are offered to all FT employees
verified_fixes.plan_assignment_check: Only employees with explicit plan_assignments or active enrollments get non-1H codes
verified_fixes.1095c_filtering: 1095-C forms correctly exclude employees with 1H offer code
